title: Raw data for RT-qPCR analysis in larvae and adult workers of Africanized honey bee (Apis mellifera).
author: Roque Justino, Arthur
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset comprises gene expression data (Ct values) obtained through RT-qPCR analysis in the Africanized honey bee ( Apis mellifera ), both during larval development and in adult workers.
steps_raw: This dataset comprises gene expression data (Ct values) obtained through RT-qPCR analysis in the Africanized honey bee ( Apis mellifera ), both during larval development and in adult workers.
